name: Earthquake
blurb: Earthquake, born Nathaniel Stroman, is an American stand-up comedian, actor, voice artist, and radio personality from Washington, D.C. A U.S. Air Force veteran who came up through the Def Comedy Jam circuit, he is known.
bio: Earthquake, born Nathaniel Stroman, is an American stand-up comedian, actor, voice artist, and radio personality from Washington, D.C. A U.S. Air Force veteran who came up through the Def Comedy Jam circuit, he is known for observational comedy about family, race, and relationships, and for the acclaimed albums and specials behind his decades-long club career. His Netflix special Chappelle's Home Team - Earthquake: Legendary was named one of the best comedy specials of 2022 by The New York Times.

timeline.ev: Co-owns Uptown Comedy Corner in Atlanta
Joins the Russell Simmons Def Comedy Jam tour for his national break
Performs an HBO One Night Stand special and About Goddamn Time
Stars in Shaquille O'Neal's All Star Comedy Jam special
Releases the Netflix special Chappelle's Home Team - Earthquake: Legendary
Releases the Netflix special Joke Telling Business

accolades: Chappelle's Home Team - Earthquake: Legendary named among the best comedy specials of 2022 by The New York Times
Cited by John Mulaney as a career influence
Host of the SiriusXM radio show Quakeshouse

specials.t: Keep Ya Head Up, And Ya Ass Down

bits.t: If Ya Cant Beat Em, Join Em
